assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 11: '**Checkout base branch**: `git checkout TC-9005` (the feature branch specified as Target Branch)'

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 13: '`gh pr create --base TC-9005`' and line 58: '**Base branch**: `TC-9005` (the feature branch, NOT main)'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 12: '**Create task branch**: `git checkout -b TC-9205` (branch named after the task's own Jira issue ID, created from TC-9005)'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 19-22 under 'Pre-Implementation Inspection': 'Read `migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs`', 'Read `migration/src/lib.rs`', 'Read `entity/src/advisory.rs`' — all three files are explicitly listed for inspection before any changes.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 43-50: commit message starts with 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' (Conventional Commits format) and includes 'Implements TC-9205' in the footer.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 11: '`git checkout TC-9005` (the feature branch specified as Target Branch)' and line 58: '**Base branch**: `TC-9005` (the feature branch, NOT main)'. conventions.md line 41: 'When Target Branch is a feature issue ID, PR targets that branch via `--base <feature-branch>`.' The plan clearly identifies TC-9005 as the Target Branch from the task description.
